text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 8 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287 

Lyrics

 
In for the kill, I feel nothing
All my memories are filled with hate
And I can think of no joy that endures

From my own birth, I know only
No emotions, not to show remorse
These are things that I can never do
